5. Phase 5: Authentication¶

This phase covers user authentication, sessions, and login management.

5.1. What You’ll Learn¶

  • User model with authentication

  • Session-based authentication

  • Login/logout functionality

  • Password hashing

  • Protected routes

  • Custom auth backends

5.2. 5.1 User Model¶

Eden provides a BaseUser mixin:

from eden.db import Model
from eden.auth.models import BaseUser

class User(Model, BaseUser):
    __tablename__ = "users"

This adds:

  • email - Unique email

  • password_hash - Hashed password

  • full_name - Optional name

  • is_active, is_staff, is_superuser - Status flags

  • last_login - Track last login

  • roles, permissions - JSON fields for RBAC

5.3. 5.2 Password Management¶

Basic - Setting passwords:

user = User(email="test@example.com")
user.set_password("securepassword123")
await user.save()

Basic - Verifying passwords:

if user.check_password("securepassword123"):
    print("Password correct!")
else:
    print("Wrong password!")

5.4. 5.3 Session Authentication¶

Basic - Enable sessions in app:

from eden import Eden

app = Eden\(title="My App")
app.add_middleware("session", secret_key="your-secret-key")

5.5. 5.4 Login/Logout¶

Basic - Login handler:

@router.post("/login")
async def login(request):
    data = await request.form_data()
    email = data.get("email")
    password = data.get("password")
    
    user = await User.query().filter(email=email).first()
    
    if not user or not user.check_password(password):
        return {"error": "Invalid credentials"}, 401
    
    # Set session
    request.session["user_id"] = str(user.id)
    request.session["user_email"] = user.email
    
    return redirect("/dashboard")

Basic - Logout handler:

@router.post("/logout")
async def logout(request):
    request.session.clear()
    return redirect("/")

5.6. 5.5 Protected Routes¶

Basic - Login required decorator:

from eden.auth.decorators import login_required

@router.get("/dashboard")
@login_required
async def dashboard(request):
    user_id = request.session.get("user_id")
    user = await User.get(user_id)
    return {"user": user.to_dict()}

Intermediate - Custom decorator:

def require_auth(func):
    async def wrapper(request, *args, **kwargs):
        if "user_id" not in request.session:
            return redirect("/login")
        return await func(request, *args, **kwargs)
    return wrapper

5.7. 5.6 Getting Current User¶

Intermediate - Dependency:

async def get_current_user(request):
    user_id = request.session.get("user_id")
    if not user_id:
        return None
    return await User.get_or_none(user_id)

@router.get("/profile")
async def profile(user = Depends(get_current_user)):
    if not user:
        return redirect("/login")
    return {"user": user.to_dict()}

5.8. 5.7 Registration¶

Intermediate - Registration form:

from eden.forms import BaseForm
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

class RegisterForm(BaseModel):
    email: str = Field(..., pattern=r"^[\w\.-]+@[\w\.-]+\.\w+$")
    password: str = Field(..., min_length=8)
    confirm_password: str

@router.post("/register")
async def register(request):
    data = await request.form_data()
    form = RegisterForm(data=data)
    
    if not await form.validate():
        return {"errors": form.errors}
    
    # Check if user exists
    existing = await User.query().filter(email=form.validated_data["email"]).first()
    if existing:
        return {"error": "Email already registered"}
    
    # Create user
    user = User(email=form.validated_data["email"])
    user.set_password(form.validated_data["password"])
    await user.save()
    
    return redirect("/login")

5.9. 5.8 Remember Me¶

Intermediate - Extended session:

@router.post("/login")
async def login(request):
    data = await request.form_data()
    remember_me = data.get("remember_me")
    
    # Set session expiry
    if remember_me:
        request.session.max_age = 30 * 24 * 60 * 60  # 30 days
    else:
        request.session.max_age = 24 * 60 * 60  # 1 day

5.10. 5.9 Complete Auth Example¶

models.py:

from eden.db import Model
from eden.auth.models import BaseUser
from eden.db.fields import f

class User(Model, BaseUser):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    username: str = f(max_length=50, unique=True)

app.py:

from eden import Eden, Router
from eden.auth.decorators import login_required
from eden.dependencies import get_db
from eden.db import Database

app = Eden\(title="Auth Demo")
app.add_middleware("session", secret_key="secret-key-change-me")

db = Database("sqlite+aiosqlite:///app.db")

@app.on_startup
async def startup():
    await db.connect(create_tables=True)

router = Router(prefix="/auth")

@router.get("/login")
async def login_page(request):
    return "<form method='POST' action='/auth/login'>...</form>"

@router.post("/login")
async def login(request):
    data = await request.form_data()
    user = await User.query().filter(email=data.get("email")).first()
    
    if user and user.check_password(data.get("password")):
        request.session["user_id"] = str(user.id)
        return redirect("/dashboard")
    
    return {"error": "Invalid credentials"}, 401

@router.post("/logout")
async def logout(request):
    request.session.clear()
    return redirect("/")

@router.get("/dashboard")
@login_required
async def dashboard(request):
    user_id = request.session.get("user_id")
    user = await User.get(user_id)
    return {"message": f"Welcome, {user.email}!"}

app.include_router(router)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run()

5.11. Summary¶

You learned:

  • User model with BaseUser mixin

  • Password hashing and verification

  • Session-based authentication

  • Login/logout functionality

  • Protected routes with @login_required

  • Registration

  • Remember me functionality

5.12. Next Steps¶

Continue to Phase 6: Permissions
